diffs.diff:
--- a/test_env.py
+++ b/test_env.py
@@ -0,0 +1,51 @@
+import torch, os, sys, time

+print("PyTorch version:", torch.__version__)

+print("CUDA available:", torch.cuda.is_available())

+if torch.cuda.is_available():

+    print("GPU:", torch.cuda.get_device_name(0))

+    print("Memory:", torch.cuda.mem_get_info())

+

+from torch_geometric.data import Data

+from torch_geometric.loader import DataLoader

+

+print("Importing model...")

+sys.path.insert(0, os.getcwd())

+from model import GINMultiTask

+

+print("Loading data...")

+train_data = torch.load('/data/train.pt', weights_only=True)

+print(f"Train size: {len(train_data['node_features'])}")

+# inspect first graph

+print("First graph nodes:", train_data['node_features'][0].shape)

+print("First graph edges:", train_data['edge_index'][0].shape)

+print("First graph edge attr:", train_data['edge_attr'][0].shape)

+num_labeled = (train_data['labels'][0]==train_data['labels'][0]).sum().item()

+print(f"Labels (non-nan) in first graph: {num_labeled}/128")

+

+class TinyDataset(torch.utils.data.Dataset):

+    def __init__(self, nf, ei, ea, labels, size=100):

+        self.nf = nf[:size]

+        self.ei = ei[:size]

+        self.ea = ea[:size]

+        self.labels = labels[:size]

+    def __len__(self):

+        return len(self.nf)

+    def __getitem__(self, idx):

+        return Data(x=self.nf[idx], edge_index=self.ei[idx], edge_attr=self.ea[idx], y=self.labels[idx])

+

+dataset = TinyDataset(train_data['node_features'], train_data['edge_index'], train_data['edge_attr'], train_data['labels'], size=128)

+loader = DataLoader(dataset, batch_size=16, shuffle=True, num_workers=0)

+

+print("Creating model...")

+model = GINMultiTask()

+device = torch.device('cuda' if torch.cuda.is_available() else 'cpu')

+model.to(device)

+print("Model params:", sum(p.numel() for p in model.parameters()))

+

+print("Running one forward pass...")

+for batch in loader:

+    batch = batch.to(device)

+    logits = model(batch.x, batch.edge_index, batch.edge_attr, batch.batch)

+    print("Logits shape:", logits.shape)

+    break

+print("Test passed: environment is functional.")
